Column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

VALID_FROM: Indicates when record validity begins, based on the business timestamp (DATE_TIME). If duplicates exist, the technical load timestamp (__load_ts) is used to resolve them.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

Column VALID_TO of the table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

VALID_TO: Indicates the datetime till when the record was valid based on the business timestamp (DATE_TIME). If duplicates exist, the technical load timestamp (__load_ts) is used to resolve them. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

ACTIVE_FLAG

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

ACTIVE_FLAG:True value for only the most recent record. All others set as False.
